---
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# momentum estimate

* get shadows of subsystem

```{julia}
# product shadows.
using RandomMeas
include("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/08_RandomMeasAdd/src/RandomMeasAdd.jl")
using .RandomMeasAdd
N = 4
siteindices = siteinds("Qubit", N);
group = import_MeasurementGroup("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", site_indices=siteindices);
# shadows = get_factorized_shadows(group);
```

## get estimate of op

### reflect op

```{julia}
# permute the order of group and create permuted_shadows
permuted_order = [x for pair = 1:N÷2 for x in (pair, N - pair + 1)];
# NOTE: This method has the function to reduce.
permuted_group, permuted_indices = import_permuted_group("./03_tools_practice/RandomMeas/04_workflow/b_data_acquisition/group.npz", siteindices, permuted_order);
permuted_shadows = get_factorized_shadows(permuted_group);
```

```{julia}
# calculate op 
adjacent_swap_op = create_adjacent_swap_op(permuted_indices);
@show linkdims(adjacent_swap_op)
@time modified_get_expect_shadow(adjacent_swap_op, permuted_shadows)
```
